x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Parts inventory enables Now Assist FSM to check availability before scheduling and recommend optimal stocking.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure stockroom locations and link parts inventory to FSM via alm_stockroom. Target: 5+ active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM uses parts availability data for AI scheduling optimization.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cba
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Parts inventory enables Now Assist FSM to check availability before scheduling and recommend optimal stocking.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Parts Inventory Integration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // alm_stockroom is the OOB stockroom/inventory table for FSM parts
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('alm_stockroom');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' active stockroom/inventory locations';

    if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM can optimize scheduling based on parts availability across inventory locations.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active stockroom location(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist FSM parts-based scheduling optimization will have limited inventory coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active stockroom locations configured. Now Assist FSM cannot optimize dispatch based on parts availability without inventory data.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000436</number><order>90</order><remediation_guidance>Configure stockroom locations and link parts inventory to FSM via alm_stockroom. Target: 5+ active stockroom locations. Now Assist FSM uses parts availability data for AI scheduling optimization.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cba</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Parts Inventory Integration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cbf81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cba</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
